findings.evidence: `TauCeti/Analysis/InnerProductSpace/HilbertBasisMap.lean:52-53` are `rw [_root_.HilbertBasis.mapₗᵢ.eq_1]` and `rfl`; Mathlib provides `LinearIsometryEquiv.trans_apply` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Analysis/Normed/Operator/LinearIsometry.lean:714` and `LinearIsometryEquiv.symm_trans` at line 763.
findings.fix: Rewrite the proof through explicit lemmas such as `HilbertBasis.repr_symm_single`, `LinearIsometryEquiv.symm_trans`, and `LinearIsometryEquiv.trans_apply`, or add a documented helper lemma exposing the needed `ofRepr` pointwise behavior.
findings.issue: `HilbertBasis.mapₗᵢ_apply` proves the pointwise image lemma by `rw [_root_.HilbertBasis.mapₗᵢ.eq_1]` followed by `rfl`, so the proof depends on the current definitional shape of the Hilbert-basis coercion and composed isometry inverse.

summary: One transported-basis proof still relies on undocumented definitional equality through `HilbertBasis.ofRepr` and `LinearIsometryEquiv.trans`, making the simp API brittle under Mathlib representation changes.
